title: Ketapang Heat Wave
lead: Ketapang is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.57. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Ketapang is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 71%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature, making it feel even hotter. 
 The wind speed of 9.7 km/h is relatively low, which can contribute to the persistence of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to safeguard public health and infrastructure.
